[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Vadid Shenvehr''' was a hangar controller who worked at [[Byblos Starport Tower 214]] hangar 217-11. He was impartial in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Shenvehr was knowledgeable in all aspects of Imperial flight regulations and Byblos traffic regulations. He was also a fully qualified [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. He didn't care who won the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as long as they didn't disrupt his hangar operations.

==Personality and traits==
Shenvehr was a dedicated worker, often spending time in the hangar even when he wasn't scheduled.
